title: "I only get web pages by number, not name"
date: 2009-07-13
forum: Networking &amp; Wireless

### Post by NE Key on 2009-07-13
After messing about with Network Manager and wicd I have re-installed Network Manager.

I can connect to the web and see web pages if I enter the number;
"70.125.67.100" gets me the google page but "www.google.com" does not.

The file   /etc/resolv.conf  (which is the same as the other machine which is working fine)  reads;

#Generated by NetworkManager
domain home
search home
nameserver 192.168.1.254


Any pointers please ?

---

### Post by Brandon Williams on 2009-07-13
First, try to determine whether DNS lookups are being done, and if so, whether they are succeeding. You can use tcpdump for this. Just run tcpdump in a terminal when you attempt to view [www.google.com](www.google.com) in the browser.

Here's an example of the tcpdump command line to use and how to interpret it:
```
$ sudo tcpdump -nvvvi any port 53
tcpdump: listening on any, link-type LINUX_SLL (Linux cooked), capture size 96 bytes
09:30:14.986183 IP (tos 0x0, ttl 64, id 63156, offset 0, flags [none], proto UDP (17), length 60) 192.168.1.21.54129 > 192.168.1.1.53: [udp sum ok] 10265+ A? www.google.com. (32)
09:30:14.986204 IP (tos 0x0, ttl 64, id 63156, offset 0, flags [none], proto UDP (17), length 60) 192.168.1.21.54129 > 192.168.1.1.53: [udp sum ok] 10265+ A? www.google.com. (32)
09:30:15.012738 IP (tos 0x0, ttl 64, id 23179, offset 0, flags [DF], proto UDP (17), length 112) 192.168.1.1.53 > 192.168.1.21.54129: 10265 q: A? www.google.com. 3/0/0 www.google.com. CNAME[|domain]
```
In this example, my machine's IP address is 192.168.1.21 and my DNS/router is 192.168.1.1. There are two UDP packets sent from my machine to DNS with attempts to lookup the IPv4 address ("A?") for [www.google.com](www.google.com), and there is one response from DNS ("q: A?").

When you do this, do you see requests going out? If so, are they "A?" or requests (IPv4) or "AAAA?" requests (IPv6)? and are they going to the correct DNS server? If they are IPv4 requests going to the correct machine, do you see responses coming back?
